description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly dark maroon metallic body accented by a bright blue horizontal stripe and circular motif on the side. The frame is angular and robust, with a short, squared-off barrel and a vented upper section near the muzzle. The grip is textured and ergonomically shaped, featuring a pronounced trigger guard and a visible trigger. The rear of the shotgun is truncated, lacking a traditional stock, and the overall design is sleek with a slightly worn, scratched finish. The blue accent lines and circular detail suggest a high-tech or sci-fi aesthetic, possibly indicating electronic or energy-based functionality. The object appears solid and heavy, with no visible moving parts such as a pump or lever.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a maroon metallic body, blue accent lines, and a textured pistol grip. The design is angular, robust, and lacks a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon body, blue accent stripe, circular motif, and the full profile of the textured grip and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the squared-off barrel, vented upper section, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the blue accent and circular motif visible, as well as the grip and trigger.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the barrel's circular end, blue circular detail, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and squared-off with venting on the upper section
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
